zh.lifeSummary: Thomasine Kirkham是Nicholas Kirkham Sr.和Jane Wrey的女兒，出生在英國薩默塞特。她和John Chudleigh至少有4個兒子。她去世於1500年在英國英格蘭戴文布拉格頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomasine Kirkham是Nicholas Kirkham Sr.和Jane Wrey的女儿，出生在英国薩默塞特。她和John Chudleigh至少有4个儿子。她去世于1500年在英国英格兰戴文布拉格頓。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly northwestern): habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire and East Yorkshire named Kirkham. The placenames derive from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’ or Old Norse heim ‘homestead, estate’.
Possibly an altered form of German Kirchham, a habitational name from either of two places called Kirchham, in Austria or Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: Thomasine
meanings: Hebrew: A twin; Thomasine is a female version.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Thomasine Kirkham was born in Somerset, England as the daughter of Nicholas Kirkham Sr. and Jane Wrey. She had at least 4 sons with John Chudleigh. She died in 1500, in Blagdon, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomasine Kirkham est née à Somerset, Angleterre, fille de Nicholas Kirkham Sr. et Jane Wrey. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec John Chudleigh. Elle est décédée en 1500, à Blagdon, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Thomasine Kirkham wurde in Somerset, England, als Tochter von Nicholas Kirkham Sr. und Jane Wrey geboren. Sie hatte mit John Chudleigh mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1500 in Blagdon, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Thomasine Kirkham è nata il nel Somerset, England come figlia di Nicholas Kirkham Sr. e Jane Wrey. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con John Chudleigh. Morì nel 1500, nel Blagdon, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasine KirkhamはイギリスソメルセトでNicholas Kirkham Sr.とJane Wreyの娘として生まれた。彼女はJohn Chudleighとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1500年にイギリスイギリスデボンブラグドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomasine Kirkham(은)는 영국 서머세트에서 Nicholas Kirkham Sr.(와)과 Jane Wrey의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 John Chudleigh(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 블래그던에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomasine Kirkham nasceu em Somerset, Inglaterra filha de Nicholas Kirkham Sr. e Jane Wrey. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com John Chudleigh. Ela faleceu em 1500, em Blagdon, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomasine Kirkham родилась в местности сомирсет, Англия. Её родителей звали Nicholas Kirkham Sr. и Jane Wrey. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от John Chudleigh. Она умерла в 1500 г. в местности благдон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Thomasine Kirkham nació en Somerset, Inglaterra como hija de Nicholas Kirkham Sr. y Jane Wrey. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con John Chudleigh. Murió en 1500, en Blagdon, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
